---
title: "In Class Activity Interaction"
author: "Debi Gonzalez"
date: "2026-03-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
class_data <- read.csv("/Users/debig/Documents/PhD Y1/Stats II/Quant II Projects/In Class Activity Interactions/socialMediaAttitudes.csv")

model_hrs <- lm(attitudes ~ hrsperday + onlineConflict + hrsperday*onlineConflict, data = class_data)
summary(model_hrs)


mean_onlineConflict <- mean(class_data$onlineConflict)
sd_onlineConflict <- sd(class_data$onlineConflict)
mean_onlineConflict + sd_onlineConflict
mean_onlineConflict
mean_onlineConflict - sd_onlineConflict
```
